zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Dampierre於大約1295年出生在比利時迪瑟 德 納姆爾時，他的父親Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders36歲，母親Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS26歲。他於大約1321年10月與Beatrix van Putten結婚。他去世於1345年4月享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Dampierre was born about 1295, in Namur, Belgium, his father, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, was 36 and his mother, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, was 26. He married Beatrix van Putten about October 1321. He died in April 1345, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Dampierre est né environ 1295, à Diocèse de Namur, Belgique, son père, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix van Putten environ octobre 1321. Il est décédé en avril 1345, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Dampierre um 1295 in Bistum Namur, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders 36 und seine Mutter Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS 26. Er hat um Oktober 1321 Beatrix van Putten geheiratet. Er starb im April 1345 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Dampierre è nato il circa 1295 nel Diocèse de Namur, Belgio, il suo padre, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix van Putten circa ottobre 1321. Morì nel aprile 1345, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Dampierreが約1295年にベルギーディオクeゼ ド ナムルで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flandersは36歳，母Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISISは26歳であった。約1321年10月にBeatrix van Puttenと結婚した。彼は1345年4月に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Dampierre(이)가 대략 1295년 벨기에 디오ce스 데 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1321년 10월 Beatrix van Putten(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1345년 4월 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Dampierre nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix van Putten aproximadamente outubro de 1321. Ele faleceu em abril de 1345, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Dampierre родился около 1295 г. в местности диокeс де намур, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix van Putten около октябрь 1321 г. Он умер апрель 1345 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de Dampierre nació aproximadamente 1295, en Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Guillaume de Dampierre IV,  Seigneur of Flanders, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alix de CLERMONT en BEAUVAISIS, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Beatrix van Putten aproximadamente octubre de 1321. Murió en abril de 1345, a la edad de 51 años.
